description: Advanced cross-stack capacity planning and resource forecasting dashboard for platform engineers managing the full LGTM+Pyroscope observability stack across multiple clusters. Provides CPU, memory, storage, ingestion, and cost attribution views with scaling recommendations.

panels.title: CPU Utilization
panels.description: Overall CPU utilization across selected clusters and stacks, calculated as the ratio of actual CPU usage to configured CPU limits. Values above 80% indicate potential CPU pressure and may require scaling.

panels.title: Memory Utilization
panels.description: Overall memory utilization across selected clusters and stacks, calculated as the ratio of working set memory to configured memory limits. Values above 80% indicate risk of OOMKill events.

panels.title: Disk Utilization
panels.description: Overall persistent volume disk utilization across selected clusters and stacks, calculated as the ratio of used bytes to total capacity. High utilization may cause write failures for Loki, Mimir, or Tempo components.

panels.title: Network Saturation
panels.description: Network transmit saturation as a percentage of 1 Gbps reference bandwidth. High values indicate potential network bottlenecks affecting inter-component communication in the observability stack.

panels.title: CPU Usage Trend (7d)
panels.description: Seven-day CPU usage trend broken down by cluster. Use this to identify sustained growth patterns and plan CPU capacity increases before limits are reached.

panels.title: CPU Usage vs Limits
panels.description: Overlay of actual CPU usage against configured CPU limits. A converging gap between usage and limits signals the need for scaling before throttling occurs.

panels.title: CPU Request vs Usage by Component
panels.description: Per-component breakdown of CPU requests versus actual usage. Identifies over-provisioned components (large gap between request and usage) and under-provisioned ones (usage exceeding requests).

panels.title: Memory Usage Trend (7d)
panels.description: Seven-day memory usage trend broken down by cluster. Sustained upward trends may indicate memory leaks or growing workloads requiring additional capacity.

panels.title: Memory Usage vs Limits
panels.description: Overlay of actual memory working set against configured memory limits. Approaching limits increases the risk of OOMKill events that disrupt observability stack components.

panels.title: Memory Request vs Usage by Component
panels.description: Per-component breakdown of memory requests versus actual working set usage. Helps right-size memory requests and identify components with excessive or insufficient memory allocations.

panels.title: PV Usage Trend
panels.description: Persistent volume usage trend broken down by PVC name. Monitors disk consumption growth for critical stateful components such as Mimir ingesters, Loki ingesters, and Tempo compactors.

panels.title: PV Available vs Capacity
panels.description: Overlay of available disk space against total PV capacity. When the available line approaches zero, immediate action is required to expand volumes or add retention policies.

panels.title: Days Until Disk Full
panels.description: Estimated number of days until persistent volumes reach full capacity based on 7-day linear extrapolation using predict_linear. Values below 7 days require immediate attention; below 30 days require planning.

targets.expr: (sum(kubelet_volume_stats_capacity_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}) - sum(kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"})) / clamp_min(sum(predict_linear(kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[7d], 86400)) - sum(kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}), 1)

panels.title: Mimir — Active Series Growth
panels.description: Total active series count in Mimir ingesters broken down by cluster. Tracks cardinality growth to anticipate ingester memory and CPU scaling needs before hitting per-tenant or global limits.

panels.title: Loki — Ingestion Bytes/s Growth
panels.description: Log ingestion rate in bytes per second for Loki distributors broken down by cluster. Rapid growth indicates increased log volume that may require distributor and ingester scaling.

panels.title: Tempo — Spans/s Growth
panels.description: Trace span ingestion rate for Tempo distributors broken down by cluster. Monitors trace volume growth to plan distributor, ingester, and compactor capacity ahead of demand.

panels.title: Mimir Active Series Distribution
panels.description: Heatmap showing the distribution of active series counts across clusters over time. Helps identify uneven cardinality distribution and potential hot-spot clusters requiring rebalancing.

panels.title: CPU Usage Share by Stack
panels.description: Proportional CPU usage share by observability stack. Identifies which stack (Mimir, Loki, Tempo, Pyroscope) consumes the most CPU resources for cost attribution and chargeback purposes.

panels.title: Memory Usage Share by Stack
panels.description: Proportional memory usage share by observability stack. Highlights the memory footprint of each stack for right-sizing and cost allocation across teams.

panels.title: Storage Usage Share by Stack
panels.description: Proportional persistent volume storage usage by observability stack. Enables storage cost attribution and identifies which stack components drive the most disk consumption.

panels.title: Components Near CPU Limit
panels.description: Top 10 components with CPU usage exceeding 70% of their configured CPU limits. These components are approaching throttling thresholds and should be prioritized for CPU limit increases or horizontal scaling.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (container, namespace) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) / sum by (container, namespace) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{resource="cpu", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}) > 0.7)

panels.title: Components Near Memory Limit
panels.description: Top 10 components with memory usage exceeding 70% of their configured memory limits. These components are at elevated risk of OOMKill and should be prioritized for memory limit increases or workload optimization.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (container, namespace) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}) / sum by (container, namespace) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{resource="memory", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}) > 0.7)

title: Cross-Stack Capacity Planning — Multi-Cluster
